hero.mainSlogan: Where the stock market meets AI:
hero.title: Where the stock market meets AI:
hero.subSlogan: We have been building AI-powered trading robots since 2015. While you focus on your daily life, our robots monitor the markets 24/7.
hero.subtitle: We have been building AI-powered trading robots since 2015. While you focus on your daily life, our robots monitor the markets 24/7.

features.sectionTitle: Technology Built to Make You Profitable
features.sectionSubtitle: Every feature is designed to bring institutional-grade trading tools within reach of individual investors.
features.feature1Desc: Our GPT-4o-based engine interprets live news feeds and technical data in real time, delivering the most accurate entry and exit signals.
features.feature2Desc: Configure stop-loss, take-profit, and trailing stop rules for your robots. Your portfolio stays protected around the clock.
features.feature3Desc: A built-in risk filter ensures no more than 5% of your account equity is at risk at any given time, preserving your capital.
features.feature4Desc: Our exchange infrastructure routes orders directly via API for near-zero latency. Zero delays, zero missed opportunities.
features.feature5Desc: Review each robot's daily, weekly, and monthly performance through interactive dashboards, and let data drive your strategy decisions.
features.feature6Desc: Your robots never sleep. When critical thresholds are breached, you'll receive instant SMS, email, or push notifications.

robotsSection.sectionSubtitle: AI-driven trading robots, each optimized for distinct market conditions and proven strategies. Fully automated.
robotsSection.robot1Desc: A quiet yet powerful momentum strategy for low-volatility market environments
robotsSection.robot2Desc: Rapid trend-following and position management built for high-volume markets
robotsSection.robot3Desc: Advanced strategy and risk management for high-capital portfolios

surec.heroSubtitle: A transparent, step-by-step process from initial inquiry to robot activation. We manage algorithmic trading on your behalf.
surec.missionDesc1: At BorsaZeka, our goal is to remove the complexity of financial markets from your plate and bring the power of algorithmic trading robots into an accessible format. While you focus on daily life, our robots monitor the markets 24/7 and execute positions at the optimal moments.
surec.missionDesc2: All transactions are conducted with full transparency — every day at
surec.missionDesc2End: results are broadcast on Telegram and Twitter. You can monitor your brokerage account in real time through the broker's mobile app.
surec.card1Desc: The robot makes its own decisions. No manual intervention required.
surec.card2Desc: Results are shared twice daily on Telegram and Twitter.
surec.card3Desc: Your brokerage account belongs solely to you — access your funds at any time.
surec.card4Desc: We only earn when you profit. No fees are charged on losing periods.
surec.robotsSubtitle: Algorithmic robots designed for every capital profile and budget. All robots are managed exclusively by our expert team.
surec.darkroomH2: Robot management handled entirely by our team
surec.trademateH2: Managed by a dedicated expert team
surec.sharedTermsTitle: Universal Terms Applicable to All Robots
surec.term3: Below ₺1M equity → €30/mo server · Above ₺1M equity → €80/mo server
surec.term4: Monthly profit sharing — no fees charged on drawdowns
surec.term5: Withdrawals must be notified 2 business days in advance
surec.term6: Robot manager must be informed before any password changes
surec.term8: Account credentials must not be shared with third parties
surec.stepsSubtitle: The entire process, from first contact to robot activation, is transparent and fully managed.
surec.step1Desc: Reach out via Twitter, Telegram, or our website. Share your preliminary details and investment objectives.
surec.step2Desc: A suitability assessment is conducted via Telegram messaging or a voice call. Your capital range and return expectations are evaluated.
surec.step3Desc: The robot that best fits your profile is identified (DarkRoom / TradeMate / Highway). Terms of use are communicated to you.
surec.step4Desc: A discounted brokerage account is opened at our partner broker. Commission is set at 0.007%, with iDeal licenses and margin configurations applied.
surec.step5Desc: A server is rented via borsazeka.com. A one-time €50 setup fee is charged. Server provisioning and robot deployment are handled entirely by our team.
surec.step6Desc: The robot goes live. Daily P&L reports are broadcast at 09:00 and 12:00. Track your account in real time through the broker's mobile app.
surec.transparencyDescEnd: all active robots' daily P&L is published on our Telegram channel and Twitter account. You can monitor your brokerage account in real time at any time via the broker's mobile app.

sections.title: Introduction
sections.content: This Privacy Policy explains how BorsaZeka OÜ (“we”, “us”, or “our”) collects, stores, processes, and protects personal and technical information related to its users (“you”, “Customer”, or “User”) in connection with the use of our algorithmic trading robots, server hosting services, and associated software products (collectively, the “Services”).

sections.title: 1. Information We Collect
sections.content: We may collect the following categories of information:
items: Account Data: Name, email address, billing information, country of residence.
Technical Data: IP address, server usage, access logs, API key activity.
Sensitive Data: Encrypted API keys, authentication tokens (stored securely via Vault infrastructure).
Communication Data: Emails, support requests, chat records for customer service purposes.

sections.title: 2. How We Use Your Data
sections.content: We process your data for the following purposes:
items: Provisioning and maintenance of your server and trading bot access
Security, fraud prevention, and abuse detection
Compliance with legal obligations and audit requirements
Improving service functionality and performance analytics

sections.title: 3. Legal Grounds for Processing
sections.content: Our data processing activities are based on:
items: Contractual necessity: To deliver the Services you’ve subscribed to
Legal obligations: Compliance with Estonian and EU regulations
Legitimate interest: To maintain service integrity and enhance user experience
Consent: For optional data processing (e.g., email newsletters, surveys)

sections.title: 4. Data Storage and Retention
sections.content: All sensitive data (e.g., API keys) is encrypted and stored using HashiCorp Vault technology. We retain data for the minimum duration necessary to fulfill our contractual or legal duties, typically no longer than 36 months after termination of the service. All infrastructure is hosted within the EU in GDPR-compliant data centers.

sections.title: 5. Data Sharing and Transfers
sections.content: No third-party sales: We do not sell user data to third parties. We may share limited data with trusted infrastructure providers (e.g., Hetzner, Microsoft Azure) strictly under data processing agreements (DPAs). Data may be disclosed to authorities if legally obligated.

sections.title: 6. Cookies and Analytics
sections.content: We may use functional cookies and privacy-focused analytics tools (e.g., Plausible, Matomo) to monitor service performance and prevent abuse. We do not use invasive third-party trackers (e.g., Google Analytics, Facebook Pixel).

sections.title: 7. Your Rights Under GDPR
sections.content: You have the following rights: Access, Rectification, Erasure, Restriction, Objection, and Portability. You may exercise these rights by emailing us at: legal@borsazeka.com

sections.title: 8. Data Protection Measures
sections.content: Two-factor authentication (2FA) is used on all admin-level systems. All sensitive records are end-to-end encrypted. We use role-based access control and zero-knowledge vaulting.

sections.title: 9. Updates to This Policy
sections.content: We may revise this Privacy Policy from time to time. All updates will be posted on our website with an updated “Last Updated” date. Your continued use of our services constitutes acceptance of the changes.

sections.title: 10. Contact
sections.content: Legal: legal@borsazeka.com | Address: BorsaZeka OÜ, Tallinn, Estonia | Register No: 16665753 | VAT No: EE102597479

sections.title: Introduction
sections.content: These Terms of Service (“Terms”) constitute a legally binding agreement between you and BorsaZeka OÜ, governing your access to and use of BorsaZeka’s cloud-based server infrastructure and accompanying algorithmic trading solutions (“Services”). By purchasing or using any Service, you agree to be bound by these Terms.

sections.title: Scope of Services
sections.content: Our Services include:
items: Virtual Private Servers (VPS) and Dedicated Servers
Proprietary trading bots: DarkRoom, BorsaZeka, TradeMate, Highway, Fabrika, KriptoZeka Classic, KriptoZeka Ascent

sections.title: 1. Service Scope
sections.content: BorsaZeka provides algorithmic trading robots hosted on virtual or dedicated servers. The customer bears full responsibility for monitoring performance, understanding market risks, and technical requirements.

sections.title: 2. Eligibility
sections.content: You affirm that you are at least 18 years of age and possess the legal capacity to enter into this contract.

sections.title: 3. Risk Disclosures
sections.content: No Financial Advice: None of the Services constitute investment advice. Market volatility, black swan events, and technology risks may materially affect results. BorsaZeka shall not be held liable for disruptions.

sections.title: 4. Fees and Billing
sections.content: Prices are listed in EUR and exclude VAT. Payments are recurring and must be settled before renewal.

sections.title: 5. License and Usage
sections.content: Customers receive a limited, non-exclusive, non-transferable license to use BorsaZeka’s algorithmic bots for the duration of their subscription. Reverse engineering is strictly prohibited.

sections.title: 6. Termination
sections.content: Either party may terminate the subscription with at least 5 days’ notice before the next billing cycle.

sections.title: 7. Liability
sections.content: To the maximum extent permitted by law, BorsaZeka shall not be liable for any indirect, incidental, special, or consequential damages.

sections.title: 8. Data & Privacy
sections.content: By using our Services, you consent to the collection and processing of technical and account-level information. We comply with GDPR.

sections.title: 9. Force Majeure
sections.content: BorsaZeka shall not be held liable for failure to fulfill its obligations due to events beyond reasonable control, including natural disasters, cyberattacks, or exchange failures.

sections.title: 10. Dispute Resolution
sections.content: These Terms are governed by the laws of Estonia. Disputes shall be submitted to the Harju County Court (Tallinn, Estonia).

sections.title: 11. Legacy Users
sections.content: These Terms apply retroactively to all users and customers who have used our Services since the company’s founding (October 24, 2022).

sections.title: 12. Updates and Revisions
sections.content: We may update these Terms from time to time. Continued use of the Service constitutes acceptance of the updated Terms.

sections.title: 13. Disclaimers
sections.content: BorsaZeka makes no representations or warranties regarding profitability or uptime guarantees. These Terms supersede all prior agreements.
